## Summary

What changed?

## Why

Why should this land in Genesis Protocol?

## Related issue

Link the issue, RFC, or backlog item.

## Change type

- [ ] philosophy or charter text
- [ ] governance or RFC change
- [ ] architecture or specification change
- [ ] MVP implementation task
- [ ] research framing
- [ ] documentation only

## Review notes

What should reviewers examine closely?

## Consequences

What assumptions, terminology, or downstream docs change because of this?

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is narrow and intentional.
- [ ] Reasoning is stated, not implied.
- [ ] Governance or architectural effects are named directly.
- [ ] Adjacent docs are updated only where necessary.
- [ ] Unresolved questions are called out.
